title: [v4.4.1-rhel] Backports for RHBZ 2213843
body:
Fixes for image volumes not working properly. Two commits, one of which was heavily modified from its original form - I really need to stop mixing important fixes into unrelated commits.

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: HTTP 503s from the registry, restarting the tests
